hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); [[ "$file" == *.go ]] && cd /Users/d430774/Sites/drupdater && go fmt "$file" && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20 || true
